runtime_scope: DB-free endpoint request signal mapper only; no reservation acquire, provider attempt, provider key open, upstream call, or billing side effect

trusted_token_signal_boundary.accepted_material: numeric trusted prompt/input/completion/total token counts only
trusted_token_signal_boundary.negative_signal_behavior: sanitize to missing and use fallback

trusted_numeric_source_availability_cont.runtime_wiring_status: not wired; runtime remains missing-tokenizer fallback until a trusted numeric tokenizer/read-model source exists
trusted_numeric_source_availability_cont.accepted_material: numeric token counts from whitelisted trusted sources only
trusted_numeric_source_availability_cont.unavailable_or_invalid_behavior: use GatewayTpmEstimateSignals::missing_tokenizer with conservative fallback; do not infer tokens from request body, prompt/input text, headers, or provider material

trusted_numeric_source_readiness_guard_c.implementation_status: readiness guard only; tokenizer/read-model adapters are not wired into runtime
trusted_numeric_source_readiness_guard_c.unavailable_behavior: use GatewayTpmEstimateSignals::missing_tokenizer with conservative fallback; do not infer tokens from request body, prompt/input text, headers, provider response, provider endpoint, or current window state
trusted_numeric_source_readiness_guard_c.available_behavior: adapter output may be converted through gateway_trusted_numeric_source_availability_from_adapter and gateway_tpm_signals_from_trusted_numeric_source in a future runtime wiring slice

trusted_numeric_source_config_preflight_.implementation_status: config/preflight gate only; tokenizer/read-model implementations are not wired into runtime
trusted_numeric_source_config_preflight_.disabled_or_blocked_behavior: emit config/preflight blocker evidence and continue GatewayTpmEstimateSignals::missing_tokenizer conservative fallback; do not fail request or infer tokens from raw material
trusted_numeric_source_config_preflight_.ready_behavior: ready only permits a future runtime slice to call trusted adapter output through readiness and availability helpers before reservation acquire

trusted_numeric_source_runtime_config_wi.implementation_status: runtime config/env wiring guard only; concrete tokenizer/read-model providers and live DB/provider smoke are not wired

trusted_numeric_source_env_config_read_b.implementation_status: env/config provider read boundary only; concrete tokenizer/read-model providers and live DB/provider smoke are not wired
trusted_numeric_source_env_config_read_b.invalid_value_behavior: refuse trusted numeric source opt-in and fall back without echoing raw env/config value
trusted_numeric_source_env_config_read_b.secret_like_value_behavior: mark secret-like value omitted and refuse trusted numeric source opt-in

trusted_numeric_source_runtime_evidence_.implementation_status: runtime evidence projection boundary only; concrete tokenizer/read-model providers, runtime writes, and live DB/provider smoke are not wired
artifact write/read opt-in contract only; default request path does not write artifacts or call tokenizer/read-model providers

trusted_numeric_source_production_wiring.implementation_status: production request path opt-in guard only; default path does not write artifacts or call tokenizer/read-model providers
ordering_contract: trusted numeric runtime evidence artifact write/read

trusted_numeric_source_provider_implemen.implementation_status: trusted tokenizer/read-model provider skeleton only; production request path and live DB/provider smoke are not wired

trusted_numeric_source_streaming_provide.implementation_status: non-stream and streaming paths consume the same GatewayTpmEstimatePlan trusted provider safe summary before reservation acquire

backend_preflight_contract.implementation_status: executable backend preflight/readback boundary only; production tokenizer/read-model backends are not wired by default
closure_conditions: token_count is a bounded non-negative integer
reservation_acquire_ready is true before reservation acquire
backend_preflight_contract.unavailable_behavior: disabled or unavailable backend preflight cannot close E8; continue conservative fallback and omit raw material

backend_adapter_implementation_slot_cont.implementation_status: repo-bounded replaceable adapter implementation slot only; no external tokenizer/read-model service is enabled by default
backend_adapter_implementation_slot_cont.unavailable_behavior: disabled, unavailable, missing, or preflight-blocked adapter slots continue fallback and cannot close E8

file_read_model_backend_harness_contract.implementation_status: repo-bounded file/persistent read-model backend test harness only; default disabled and no external service
closure_conditions: artifact path is scoped under tests/fixtures/gateway
token_count is a bounded non-negative integer
file_read_model_backend_harness_contract.unavailable_behavior: disabled, out-of-scope, unreadable, malformed, or misaligned artifacts continue fallback and cannot close E8

file_read_model_backend_live_smoke_comma.implementation_status: repo-bounded opt-in live-smoke/readback command gate only; default disabled and no external service
closure_conditions: artifact path is scoped under tests/fixtures/gateway
backend preflight readback status is available
required/acquire/db TPM capacity evidence is aligned
file_read_model_backend_live_smoke_comma.unavailable_behavior: missing opt-in, missing fixture, failed readback, or unaligned reservation evidence keeps the command gate blocked/disabled and cannot close production tokenizer/read-model backend

production_backend_dod_checklist_contrac.implementation_status: final E8 closure checklist only; default Gateway runtime remains disabled/fallback until a production tokenizer/read-model backend and live smoke readback are provided
production_backend_dod_checklist_contrac.unavailable_behavior: blocked, unavailable, simulated, or repo-fixture-only evidence cannot move E8 to final [x]

production_backend_runner_artifact_contr.implementation_status: external operator runner artifact schema/contract only; Gateway default runtime remains disabled/fallback and no external service is called
production_backend_runner_artifact_contr.unavailable_behavior: all failing taxonomy states remain production_ready_blocked; only a fresh non-simulated non-fixture production artifact with DB acquire/result and secret-safe readback can pass

accepted_for_review: runtime/current commit markers match expected runtime
generated_at present and artifact_fresh is not false
Gateway live smoke status is passed
DB acquire/result evidence and readback counts are present

status_semantics.production_ready_blocked: operator handoff is incomplete or non-production; cannot close E8
status_semantics.production_evidence_accepted_for_review: bounded artifact has the required external evidence shape but is a repo simulation or still needs operator review; cannot close final E8 gap
status_semantics.production_backend_live_smoke_passed: fresh non-simulated non-fixture production runner artifact passed readback with DB acquire/result evidence
status_semantics.final_e8_x: requires production_backend_live_smoke_passed plus reviewed live Gateway smoke/readback; contract/selftest/fixture alone cannot substitute

preflight_checklist: backend kind/source are declared by operator
token source kind/count are numeric and match expected count
live smoke URL/scope is bounded to Gateway operator smoke
DB reservation table/readback target is declared

commands.cleanup: Remove-Item -LiteralPath .tmp/gateway_tpm_production_backend/<artifact>.json after evidence is copied to the operator evidence store
commands.rollback: unset GATEWAY_TPM_PRODUCTION_BACKEND_EVIDENCE, GATEWAY_TPM_TRUSTED_READ_MODEL_ENABLED, GATEWAY_TPM_TRUSTED_TOKENIZER_ENABLED, and GATEWAY_TPM_PRODUCTION_ARTIFACT_PATH; stop the smoke process without changing Gateway defaults

final_proof_bundle: secret-safe proof with raw material omitted

required_evidence: current runtime marker and current commit
eligibility_rules: no artifact or missing opt-in is final_x_eligible=false
repo fixture and accepted simulation are final_x_eligible=false
negative artifact readback is final_x_eligible=false with blocker
production_backend_live_smoke_passed real operator evidence is final_x_eligible=true

required_operator_actions: run the real production tokenizer/read-model backend runner
run Gateway live smoke with bounded E8 rate-limit TPM scope

closure_conditions: artifact current_commit matches current runtime commit
Gateway live smoke status is passed
db_acquire_evidence, db_acquire_result, and readback counts are present
simulation_can_close_final_gap is true for final production closure
production_backend_evidence_runbook_cont.unavailable_behavior: default contract-only, unsafe paths, repo fixtures, simulated runners, and missing live DB/backend evidence remain production_ready_blocked

trusted_numeric_source_production_provid.implementation_status: explicit env opt-in can invoke an env-backed replaceable trusted numeric provider; default request path remains conservative fallback

trusted_numeric_source_request_path_opt_.implementation_status: request-path opt-in handoff only; default path does not call provider or write runtime evidence artifacts

trusted_numeric_source_runtime_adapter_b.implementation_status: runtime adapter boundary only; concrete tokenizer/read-model providers and live DB/provider smoke are not wired

trusted_numeric_source_opt_in_runtime_ev.implementation_status: opt-in evidence gate only; tokenizer/read-model implementations and live DB/provider smoke are not wired

status_mapping.disabled: config disabled; evidence must show fallback and cannot close live gap
status_mapping.blocked: config enabled but provider unavailable; evidence must show blocker and continue fallback
status_mapping.ready: config ready plus trusted numeric source availability plus aligned reservation capacities may close live gap

live_gap_closure_conditions: trusted_source_evidence.token_count is a bounded non-negative integer
evidence is recorded after prompt-protection allow and before reservation acquire/provider side effect

trusted_numeric_source_reservation_proje.implementation_status: projection handoff only; runtime tokenizer/read-model implementation and live DB/provider smoke are not wired
live_gap_closure_conditions: projection is recorded after prompt-protection allow and before reservation acquire/provider side effect

trusted_numeric_source_adapter_boundary_.implementation_status: adapter boundary only; tokenizer/read-model adapters are not wired into runtime

runtime_source_guard.trusted_signal_runtime_status: not wired until a tokenizer/read-model numeric source is available

tpm_estimate.used_conservative_fallback is false when the trusted signal is present
